Implement the `Algorithm` enum in `com.magrathea.trustengine.domain.kms`. The enum must have at least the constant `EC_P256` with curve name `"secp256r1"` and key size `256`, accessible via `curveName()` and `keySize()` methods.

Describe command:
  cd trust-engine-domain && ../bin/javaspec describe com.magrathea.trustengine.domain.kms.Algorithm

  Described class: com.magrathea.trustengine.domain.kms.Algorithm
  No production class was generated. Run `javaspec run` to continue the PHPSpec-style workflow.

javaspec generated AlgorithmSpec.java (empty body) and AlgorithmSpecSupport.java (ObjectBehavior subclass, no proxy methods yet). Next step: add the first RED assertion to AlgorithmSpec.java.

Kept the javaspec-generated KeyUsage.java as-is (it is complete and correct) and removed the re-inserted valueOf stub from Algorithm.java.
